/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/dingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/dingo_peripheral_msgs/msg/_electrical_measurements_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tdp378/DingoQuadruped/build/dingo_peripheral_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
